narrative:
Clay Twp township has 3,211 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.0%, a clear Republican lean of 6.8 percentage points.
